snapshot.targetText: 2025-07-19: On her identity and work: 'here's the thing about me you should file away: for fifteen years I have basically been the person who is her work. Not in a grim way — I mean it like an engine. The next launch, the next rung, the harder problem. That's how I've always known I'm okay. It's how I know who I am. I'm the one who never turns down the bigger role. Ambition's been my whole spine.' (2025-07-19)
Priya, closest friend from grad school; ceramicist and freelance designer; Dana and Priya signed up for a Tuesday night pottery class together starting 2025-02-12

Marathon training halted; sprained ankle badly on 2025-04-13 during trail run in Forest Park (grade-two sprain, possibly worse); in walking boot, orthopedist appointment 2025-04-18; withdrew from Lakefront Marathon October 2025; doctor advised eight to ten weeks before running again

Plans to visit Marcus in Denver before summer 2025 to meet niece Nina; Marcus offered 'the guest room is yours'; Dana described this as 'obligation, the good kind' and 'a thing I owe now, and I want to owe it' (as of 2025-03-09)
